coverage: 100% of reachable node types; the browser evaluates all 1,007 nodes in the root closure.
validation: Four Blender/VM cases cover authored settings, wrapper switching, thickness, and wrapper dimensions. The portable dump now preserves every float32 coordinate of the authored drawing curve and Grill Teef target, and Resample Curve reproduces Blender's cached final-segment factor. Raycast direction normalization and all 6,213 target points are bit-exact. The reusable Gradient Direction contract now evaluates every corner-order fan triangle instead of repeating only the first triangle across an n-gon. That advances the authored result from 61,686 to 61,799 vertices against Blender's 61,812 while preserving the exact 53,892 faces; its maximum bounds difference is 0.0018 units. Wrapper-enabled is identical, thickness 6 is 42,019 / 33,430 versus 42,031 / 33,434 with a 0.0204-unit bounds difference, and wrapper 60 by 45 is 38,338 / 33,678 versus 38,301 / 33,678 with a 0.0002-unit bounds difference. The remaining authored 13-vertex Auto Smooth residual begins upstream: Geometry Proximity differs by at most 0.0000019073 in 3,241 of 52,555 distances, which perturbs near-flat curvature gradients before the three-pass sharpen group. Applying the browser Edge Angle rule to Blender's exact pre-split mesh still produces Blender's exact 61,812 vertices, so Split Edges and the angle threshold are ruled out.
